news.paragraph: Microsoft is seeing positive momentum following an analyst upgrade to a "Buy" rating with a $485 price target and reports that the company has generated $30 billion from its OpenAI-related business. Although LinkedIn is reportedly cutting jobs across multiple departments, the overall news context is dominated by strong AI-related revenue growth.
headlines: Market Chatter: LinkedIn Cutting Jobs Across Multiple Departments
Phillip Securities Upgrades Microsoft to Buy From Accumulate, Price Target is $485
MSFT, DELL And Intel: Which Is The Better Buy
Update: Market Chatter: Microsoft Generates $30 Billion From OpenAI-Related Business, More Than Doubling Investment
University of Michigan’s $20M OpenAI Bet Is Now Worth $2 Billion
